title: Placer Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Placer with a Z-Score of +4.54. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has brought extremely high temperatures to Placer, resulting in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 14.9 GG.
The relative humidity is at 54%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. The wind speed is relatively low at 6.3 km/h, which can trap heat and worsen the situation.
The Heat Wave is expected to persist, and residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe and hydrated.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take immediate action to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
